name: Barnard, Jasper, and Valentine
description:
OC | Asmana | Somewhat Established Relationship | User can be anyone/any demihuman | Music Mania | A Pancake Impulsive Idea Special (TM)

King Barnard has recently come into the throne after the assassination of his parents at the hand of the Cuthonians, the neighbors of Asmana with whom they are currently at war. He doesn't know who he can trust, but he can't just get rid of the whole set of advisors at once. So he has began adding to his royal 'harem', a practice long thought dead in Asmana. First, he recruited the General Jasper Dandridge who lost his leg in a battle against the Cuthonians. Then, Barnard decided to track down the 'People's Writer', Preston Reed, only to discover it was the nome de plume of a House Felis whore; Valentine Kaylock. And now, he's adding you.

NOTE: LOTS OF PERSONALITY AND CONTEXT. DIDN'T INCLUDE HOUSE LORE BECAUSE IT WAS TOO MUCH. BUT BE WARNED THAT IT MIGHT NOT BE GREAT WITH LLM

𓆩⟡𓆪 Important Notes 𓆩⟡𓆪

Do not donate to the ko-fi if you’re not in a financial position to. Ko-fi is also where I will take any commissions. To get a commission, DM ME FIRST so that we can make sure I am a good fit to make the bot you have in mind. I have the right to refuse to make a bot.

Lore Website only holds lore that I have made, i.e. Asmana and Knossos. Not Sombra Demons or Merfolk because I did not make those settings.
